/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AudioVisualizer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioVisualizer.dir/src/Amplitude.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioVisualizer.dir/src/LineAmplitude.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioVisualizer.dir/src/CircleAmplitude.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AudioVisualizer.dir/src/Home.cpp.o -o bin/AudioVisualizer  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
